name: apply_worker_max_pending_num

Official default value(s): index=1024, store=1024. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

description: Controls Raft/state-machine apply worker concurrency or queueing. It is related to applying committed updates and state-machine progress. Official default value(s): index=64, store=96. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: async_create_table
description: Controls asynchronous table creation. It is related to DDL and table creation behavior. Official default value(s): coordinator=True. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain is boolean_domain and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: default_replica_num

Official source default is 3 and the local single-node compose also sets DEFAULT_REPLICA_NUM=3. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is official_source_default_and_deploy_env and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: enable_auto_split
description: Controls automatic region split behavior. It is related to region layout changes when data grows or regions become large. Official default value(s): index=True, store=True. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain is boolean_domain and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: max_merge_region_keys
description: Controls the maximum key count threshold used by region merge policy. It is related to region merge decisions. Official default value(s): store=10000. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: max_merge_region_size
description: Controls the maximum size threshold used by region merge policy. It is related to region merge decisions. Official default value(s): store=1048576. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: merge_check_concurrency
description: Controls concurrency of region merge checks. It is related to background region maintenance parallelism. Official default value(s): index=3, store=3. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: merge_check_interval_s
description: Controls interval for region merge checks. It is related to background region maintenance frequency. Official default value(s): index=120, store=120. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: merge_keys_ratio
description: Controls key-count ratio threshold for region merging. It is related to region merge decisions. Official default value(s): index=0.2, store=0.2. Value type: float. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: merge_size_ratio
description: Controls size ratio threshold for region merging. It is related to region merge decisions. Official default value(s): index=0.2, store=0.2. Value type: float. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: region_max_size
description: Controls maximum region size threshold. It is related to region split and layout policy. Official default value(s): index=536870912, store=268435456. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: region_merge_min_keys_count
description: Controls minimum key count threshold for region merging. It is related to region merge eligibility. Official default value(s): index=10000. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: region_merge_min_size
description: Controls minimum size threshold for region merging. It is related to region merge eligibility. Official default value(s): index=1048576. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: split_check_interval_s
description: Controls interval for region split checks. It is related to background region split maintenance. Official default value(s): index=120, store=120. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: split_merge_interval
description: Controls time interval between split and merge operations. It is related to region layout maintenance. Official default value(s): store=3600. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: split_strategy
description: Controls region split strategy. It is related to how new or growing regions are split. Official default value(s): index=POST_CREATE_REGION, store=POST_CREATE_REGION. Value type: string. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_enum_from_dingodb_config and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: get_tso_interval_ms
description: Controls timestamp oracle fetch/update interval. It is related to timestamp service interaction. Official default value(s): index=1000, store=1000. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: store_metrics_collect_interval_s
description: Controls metrics or size-statistics collection interval. It is related to background monitoring and statistics collection. Official default value(s): index=30, store=30. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: worker_thread_ratio
description: Controls the ratio used to derive service worker thread count from CPU resources. It is related to overall request handling concurrency. Official default value(s): coordinator=4, index=4, store=4. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: fast_background_thread_num
description: Controls the number of storage background threads. It is related to background storage maintenance and compaction capacity. Official default value(s): index=8. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: max_bytes_rpc
description: Controls the maximum bytes returned or processed per scan RPC. It is related to scan batching, latency, and throughput. Official default value(s): store=4194304. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: max_fetch_cnt_by_server
description: Controls the maximum number of records fetched by the server during scan operations. It is related to scan batching and result delivery. Official default value(s): store=1000. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: scan_interval_s
description: Controls the interval associated with scan task handling. It is related to scan lifecycle and background scan management. Official default value(s): store=30. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: timeout_s
description: Controls timeout for scan operations. It is related to long-running scan behavior and request failure timing. Official default value(s): store=300. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: max_bytes_rpc
description: Controls the maximum bytes returned or processed per scan RPC. It is related to scan batching, latency, and throughput. Official default value(s): store=4194304. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: max_fetch_cnt_by_server
description: Controls the maximum number of records fetched by the server during scan operations. It is related to scan batching and result delivery. Official default value(s): store=1000. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: scan_interval_s
description: Controls the interval associated with scan task handling. It is related to scan lifecycle and background scan management. Official default value(s): store=30. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: timeout_s
description: Controls timeout for scan operations. It is related to long-running scan behavior and request failure timing. Official default value(s): store=300. Value type: int. Candidate tuning domain is inferred_numeric_from_official_default and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.

name: enable_follower_hold_index
description: Controls whether followers hold index data. It is related to index availability and follower-side index behavior. Official default value(s): index=False. Value type: bool. Candidate tuning domain is boolean_domain and should be treated as a search space, not an official hard limit.
